### Post by vreimz on 2007-05-27
I have  ATI radeon 9550 grapihics card and acer AL1916W monitor. But I can't select a normal resolution from System->Preferences->Screen Resolution.  (1400x900 o.s.t)

xorg.config looks like that:

# /etc/X11/xorg.conf (xorg X Window System server configuration file)
#
# This file was generated by dexconf, the Debian X Configuration tool, using
# values from the debconf database.

### Post by Kobalt on 2007-05-27
The resolution you want isn't in your xorg.conf, you'll need to add it. Do it this way : open up a Terminal and enter this command line ```
sudo dpkg-reconfigure -phigh xserver-xorg
```Select your driver then select the resolutions you want as available by hitting the spacebar. Validate with Enter, and finally restart X by pressing Ctrl+Alt+Backspace. You should be done.

---
